summary: Iteration 190: Tested PO Format Learning Engine. All 13 backend tests passed. Frontend /monitor page loads correctly with all sections including the new PO Gaps Resolved metric in backfill results.
critical_code_review_comments: NEW: GET /api/posting-patterns/po-format-intelligence endpoint returns PO format learning summary with vendors_tracked, total_match_attempts, top_transformations, worst_match_vendors
NEW: POST /api/posting-patterns/intelligence/backfill now includes po_revalidation step that re-runs PO matching on documents with po_validation gaps using enhanced intelligence

PO Format Learning Service (po_format_learning_service.py) implements 15+ transformations: strip_vendor_suffix, strip_prefix_po, numeric_only, strip_leading_zeros, last_segment, first_segment, middle_segment, prefix_W, etc.
Integration in bc_validation_service.py (lines 659-678): PO candidates are expanded via get_smart_po_candidates() before BC validation
Learning loop: record_po_match() is called after each PO validation attempt to track outcomes and update vendor-level PO format intelligence
All 7 gap closers present and working: gap_1_confidence_calibration through gap_7_escalation_intelligence
Vendor maturity labels correctly use new labels: autonomous, stable, developing, learning, novice
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 190 tested the new PO Format Learning Engine. Key features: (1) /po-format-intelligence endpoint returns learning summary. (2) /intelligence/backfill now includes po_revalidation step. (3) PO format learning service has 15+ transformations that are applied in priority order based on vendor-specific learning. (4) Integration in bc_validation_service.py expands PO candidates via smart transformations before BC validation. All working correctly.

backend_endpoints: GET /api/posting-patterns/po-format-intelligence - PASS (returns vendors_tracked, total_match_attempts, top_transformations, worst_match_vendors)
frontend_components: Automation Health card with 19% score - PASS
5 Metric cards (Confidence, Vendor Maturity, Auto-File, Gaps, Escalation) - PASS
Backfill result card with PO Gaps Resolved metric - PASS
